name: Argonak
description: Pick off targets by highlighting distant enemies using this Grineer rifle's advanced laser sighting system. Deadly in both single fire and automatic modes.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Pick off targets by highlighting distant enemies using this Grineer rifle's advanced laser sighting system. Deadly in both single fire and automatic modes.

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Amalgam Argonak Metal Auger FX Energy color covering the entire enemy in a solid color. It now envelopes the enemy is a ghostly FX!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Amalgam Argonak not applying to Dagger-type Zaws.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Amalgam Argonak Metal Auger enemy highlighting not functioning if you aim at Gara's Mass Vitrify wall.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the "+" from Amalgam Argonak Metal Auger Mod in "Reduces Armor by +X."

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Amalgam Argonak Metal Auger Mod not removing Armor with Dagger attacks.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.8
patchlogs.changes: Increased the brightness of the Argonaks enemy highlight FX.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes: Replaced primary/secondary titles of Argonak fire modes with Semi and Auto.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Argonak’s highlight not using custom colors.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the sound gain from the Argonak and Astilla.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.additions: Pick off targets by highlighting distant enemies using this Grineer rifle's advanced laser sighting system. Deadly in both single fire and automatic modes. Visit your Dojo to research the Argonak!
